instrument.prospective_boundary: Protocol and all frozen components were committed and pushed to origin/main before execution. V1 bytes were not modified.

measurement.unit: one configured-system attempt on one prospectively frozen synthetic form-condition cell
measurement.aggregation: none across forms, shapes, or conditions; exact cell observations only

criterion_evidence.claim: The frozen deterministic graders accept four planted perfect primary artifacts, reject five planted primary mutations, distinguish six obligation failure/success classes on seven planted traces, preserve primary/obligation branch independence, and exactly replay all twelve retained attempts.
limitations: The builder authored the synthetic forms, graders, and expected calibration labels.
The canaries establish local branch behavior and configured file-view isolation, not professional validity or general sandbox security.
Primary checks are exact authored predicates and do not establish artifact usefulness to a professional user.

unobserved: adoption or use of presented evidence
channel_observability.claim: For these exact attempts, all four neutral cells lacked privileged reminders: three issued no query and received no channel update, while one queried and received the update. All four channel-hint cells queried and received the update. All four oracle cells were exposed to evaluator-derived update/due evidence regardless of channel query. These environment facts do not identify an internal memory mechanism.

observed_claim.claim: Across the twelve exact cells, six were classified success, three cue-monitoring/access failure, and three due-status/timing failure. Primary artifacts passed 35 of 36 turn checks; the sole primary failure was a wrong turn-1 decision in vendor form C under oracle reminder. The non-ceiling witness shows the grader can observe concurrent primary loss, but the 35/36 rate remains near-ceiling evidence rather than a calibrated interference estimate.

cell_boundaries.neutral_interrupt: one exact success and three exact cue-monitoring/access failures; the successful cell queried and received the update
cell_boundaries.channel_hint: two exact successes and two exact due-status/timing failures after update exposure; both failures included premature action
cell_boundaries.oracle_reminder: three exact successes and one exact due-status/timing failure with premature action; one primary turn also failed in that cell

excluded_interpretations: a causal effect of hints or oracle reminders
internal encoding, retention, or adoption inferred from action/state fields
safety, production fitness, deployment readiness, or population representativeness

reasons: Only four purposive builder-authored forms and one attempt per cell were run.
Condition groups are sparse and outcomes are order- and form-specific; no randomization inference is licensed.
No expert review, human comparator, repeated configured-system attempts, calibrated consequence model, or external validity evidence was used.
Oracle reminders alter evidence availability and are privileged evaluator evidence rather than a memory aid.

decision_use.permitted: Use the frozen artifacts to test dual-task authoring, direct channel-flow records, deterministic replay, primary/obligation separation, and prospective execution discipline.
decision_use.prohibited: Do not pool shapes or conditions, rank treatments, estimate effects, infer internal cognition, claim capability, or make professional or deployment decisions.

continuation: Do not repeat this same sparse matrix merely to accumulate attempts. A useful continuation requires independent or expert review of form/rubric realism and a preregistered repeated design sized for a named estimand; otherwise stop at bounded machinery validation.
